whyUs.title: Why Should I Use Bookera.com to Find a Cheap Hotel?

0.title: Countless options
0.desc: With Bookera, you can filter thousands of hotels by your preferences and find the most suitable hotel for you within seconds.

1.title: The best-value hotel
1.desc: Don't get lost among confusing price and service options; set your preferences and instantly reserve your room at the hotel that suits you best.

2.title: Fast and easy
2.desc: With Bookera, you only need a few seconds to find the hotel you're looking for.

3.title: Buy with confidence
3.desc: All your payment transactions are protected by GlobalSign, one of the world's leading security certificate companies.

0.q: How does BOOKERA offer the best hotel prices?
0.a: BOOKERA, Turkey's travel site, compares and lists thousands of hotel options based on the destination and dates where you want to stay, with hotel prices to suit every budget. You can sort the listed hotels by price ascending or descending, by rating, by proximity to the center, and by relevance. You can choose the hotel that best suits you by using many filters such as guest reviews, board type, reservation cancellation, and theme.

1.q: How can I make my hotel reservation on BOOKERA?
1.a: To make a hotel reservation on BOOKERA, you can use our website or mobile app. By selecting the place and dates where you want to stay, you can compare thousands of properties and safely book by choosing the hotel and room that best suits you. By becoming an BOOKERA member, you can complete your transaction within seconds.

2.q: Can I make an international hotel reservation on BOOKERA?
2.a: On BOOKERA, you can list thousands of international hotels serving all around the world based on the place and dates of your stay. By choosing the hotel that suits you from among the many theme options, you can make a reservation easily and reliably.

3.q: Can I get more information about the property and room details?
3.a: If you would like more information about the property and room you have selected, you can contact our travel advisors via our call center at 0850 811 90 90.

4.q: What should I pay attention to when making a hotel reservation?
4.a: There are some points to consider when making a hotel reservation so that you don't experience any problems during your stay. The hotel's location and star rating are among the leading criteria that influence your choice. In addition, extra fees, pet policy, and services such as transfers and restaurants are among the things you should keep in mind when booking.

5.q: Can I cancel my hotel reservation on BOOKERA?
5.a: When making a hotel reservation on BOOKERA, there is a free cancellation option in the reservation conditions section under filters. By selecting this filter, you can cancel your hotel reservations that fall within the scope of free cancellation. For all other cancellation and change transactions, you can call our free call center at 0850 811 90 90.

6.q: How does BOOKERA ensure the security of my transactions?
6.a: All transactions you make through BOOKERA are secured with an SSL certificate. In addition, 3D Security assurance is provided at the payment step when making a hotel reservation. All your payment transactions are protected by DigiCert, one of the world's leading security certificate companies.

price.taxesIncluded: All taxes and fees are included.

checkInOut.title: Check-in / Check-out
checkInOut.body: Check-in is at 14:00 and check-out is at 12:00. Early check-in and late check-out requests are subject to the property's availability.

childExtraBed.title: Children and Extra Beds
childExtraBed.body: Children aged 0-6 stay free of charge in the same room as their parents. Extra bed requests must be communicated to the property in advance.

pets.title: Pets
pets.body: Pets are not allowed at the property (except guide dogs).

payment.title: Payment
payment.body: Your reservation is charged online based on the amount stated at the payment step. All taxes and fees are included in the price.

cancellation.title: Cancellation Terms
cancellation.body: Reservations with free cancellation selected can be cancelled free of charge up to the stated period before the check-in date. For details, you can contact our call center.
